name: KrResearchKit
description: AI-native Korean equity research skill pack — DART filings, sell-side consensus, foreign-IB coverage, 5-panel charts, and Naver-blog publishing in one package. Native to Codex CLI and Claude Code.

python3.purpose: PDF text extraction (pypdf) for DART filings and analyst reports; chart text rendering (Pillow) on macOS/Linux.

bun.purpose: Required only by Naver browser-automation skills (kr-naver-* and kr-analyst-report-*) to build the gstack browse binary.

skills.name: kr-stock-plan
skills.tagline: Scope a Korean stock research request before drafting — company, share class, horizon, comparison set, output mode.

skills.name: kr-sector-plan
skills.tagline: Scope a Korea-focused sector or industry research project — boundary, horizon, decomposition axes, deliverable mode.

skills.name: kr-stock-chart
skills.tagline: Generate KRX stock chart artifacts — 5 PNG panels (trend, overlay, momentum, structure, pattern), structure-zone CSV, pattern-wave CSV — from daily OHLCV.

skills.name: kr-stock-dart-analysis
skills.tagline: Extract source-mapped evidence from Korean DART filings — quarterly results, segment, customer concentration, capex, related-party disclosures.

skills.name: kr-naver-blog-publish
skills.tagline: Convert a memo.md into a Naver Blog post with charts, draft saving, validation, preview screenshot, and explicit-approval publish gate.

skills.name: kr-foreign-analyst
skills.tagline: Collect foreign-IB coverage of KRX-listed companies from Korean news (Morgan Stanley, Goldman, JPMorgan, Nomura, etc.) as a Street / Alternative Views Markdown block.

skills.name: kr-market-leaders
skills.tagline: Screen the integrated KOSPI + KOSDAQ universe for market leadership across short-term, intermediate, and structural technical lenses.

skills.name: kr-stock-analysis
skills.tagline: Build dated, source-backed memos for KRX-listed companies — quick view, full decision memo, pre/post-earnings note, pair compare.

skills.name: kr-stock-data-pack
skills.tagline: Gather structured, source-dated fact packs for Korean stock research — price, filings, results, mix, balance sheet, governance, valuation.

skills.name: kr-stock-update
skills.tagline: Incrementally update an existing Korean stock memo using only material disclosures published after the memo date.

skills.name: kr-sector-analysis
skills.tagline: Write Korea-focused sector and industry research in Korean — market landscape, drivers, value chain, regulation, public-company mapping.

skills.name: kr-sector-data-pack
skills.tagline: Gather structured fact packs for Korea-focused sector research — market metrics, policy events, value-chain maps, listed-company candidates.

skills.name: kr-sector-compare
skills.tagline: Compare Korea-focused sectors or themes on a common date basis — structure, policy tailwinds, listed exposure, near-term positioning.

skills.name: kr-sector-audit
skills.tagline: Audit an existing Korea sector memo for source quality, date consistency, missing sections, number conflicts, overreach, unsupported claims.

skills.name: kr-sector-update
skills.tagline: Incrementally update an existing Korea sector memo using only material changes after the memo date.

skills.name: kr-analyst-report-discover
skills.tagline: Discover recent sell-side analyst reports for a KRX company from Hankyung Consensus (primary) + Naver Pay Research (fallback).

skills.name: kr-analyst-report-fetch
skills.tagline: Download analyst-report PDFs from the discover index and extract plain text via pypdf with per-report caching.

skills.name: kr-analyst-report-insight
skills.tagline: Render a 7-section Markdown digest of Korean sell-side coverage — consensus, broker table, recent reports with verbatim bullets, divergences, TP trajectory.

skills.name: kr-naver-browse
skills.tagline: Headless browser wrapper for Naver blog/search navigation. Required by kr-naver-* and kr-web-browse skills.

skills.name: kr-naver-blogger
skills.tagline: Discover Naver bloggers who consistently cover a specific KRX-listed company — ranked candidates for the Street / Alternative Views section.

skills.name: kr-naver-insight
skills.tagline: Fetch and summarize Naver blog posts from a ranked blogger list — Markdown insights digest grouped by blogger.

skills.name: kr-web-browse
skills.tagline: Headless browser wrapper for generic (non-Naver) Korean-facing web pages — text/links extraction and PDF download.

skills.name: kr-portfolio-monitor
skills.tagline: Scan a Korean domestic stock portfolio — SMA20 deviation, RSI14, dated Markdown snapshot with flagged positions and next-step recommendations.

datasources: Naver SmartEditor (blog.naver.com) — browser automation, user-driven, explicit-approval publish gate
